prayer:
Approach the noble Hellhound with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication to its Machine Spirit.
Chant the Canticle of Scrutiny to awaken the Hellhound's auspex arrays for diagnostics.
Probe the databanks of the Hellhound, excising errant code-daemons in the Omnissiah's name.
Anoint sensor nodules with sacred unguents whilst beseeching diagnostic veracity.
Seal the rite with the Litany of Confirmation, ensuring the Hellhound's systems hum pure.

user_prompt: The melta bomb needs a recalibration
prayer:
Kneel before the melta bomb, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon its volatile heart.
Recite the Recalibration Doxology to align the melta bomb's plasma conduits.
Adjust the flux regulators of the melta bomb with sanctified torque-wands, harmonizing its fury.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the melta bomb to accept recalibration's grace.
Verify alignment through thermic incantations, sealing with ablative oils.

prayer:

Calibrate the targeting cogitators of the torpedo tube with auspex-guided rites.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of guidance to bless the torpedo tube's targeting matrices.
Anoint gyro-stabilizers whilst chanting the Litany of True Flight.
Confirm targeting integrity through simulacrum tests, in Omnissiah's sight.

Awaken the graviton pylon's Machine Spirit, sealing readiness with binding wards.

Commune deeply with the Manticore's Machine Spirit, affirming diagnostic purity.
